name: claude-depot
description: A curated depot of Claude Code plugins — skills, tools, and extensions

plugins.name: trmm-expert
plugins.description: Tactical RMM documentation expert skill for answering questions about the TRMM remote monitoring and management platform

plugins.name: skill-creator-enhanced
plugins.description: Guide for creating effective Claude Code skills with templates, validators, and packaging tools

plugins.name: claude-docs
plugins.description: AI-powered search and access to Anthropic documentation — Claude Code CLI, API, Agent SDK, and more

plugins.name: rules-auditor
plugins.description: Audit Claude Code rules and CLAUDE.md files for staleness, quality, and drift against the actual codebase

plugins.name: continual-learning
plugins.description: Hooks that enable Claude Code to learn, reflect, and persist knowledge across sessions via two-tier SQLite memory

plugins.name: mcp-toolkit
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for building MCP Apps with interactive UIs and packaging MCP servers as MCPB desktop extensions

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Comprehensive Obsidian skill covering Markdown, Bases, CLI, and Web Clipper templates

plugins.name: plan-to-vault
plugins.description: Automatically archive Claude Code plan files to an Obsidian vault when exiting plan mode, with multi-machine origin tracking

plugins.name: vault-tools
plugins.description: Vault-specific skills, rules, and hooks for Obsidian knowledge bases — note creation, search, inbox processing, maintenance, and frontmatter validation

plugins.name: cache-cleanup
plugins.description: Clean up old cached plugin versions to free disk space
